description: The WorldItemInterface component is used with Data Feeds to show information about a particular world mapped to it. This is used in the worlds menu.

fields.WorldName: The name of the world mapped to this template.
fields.Description: The description of the world mapped to this template.
fields.ThumbnailUrl: The URL of the preview world texture for the world mapped to this template.
fields.JoinedUsers: The amount of users currently in the world mapped to this template.
fields.ActiveUsers: The amount of focused active users in the world mapped to this template.
fields.IsHost: Whether the local user is the host of the world mapped to this template.
fields.AwayKickEnabled: Whether away kick is enabled for this world.
fields.AwayKickInterval: The interval at which after this amount of time, users should be kicked.
